metadata.title: KSA 数据字典 / KSA Data Codebook

occupation_code.description_en: Unique identifier for each occupation in the Chinese Classification of Occupations (2022)
occupation_code.description_zh: 《中国职业分类大典（2022）》中每个职业的唯一标识符

occupation_name.example: 中国共产党机关负责人
occupation_name.description_en: Official name of the occupation in Chinese

isco08_code.description_en: International Standard Classification of Occupations 2008 code
isco08_code.description_zh: 国际标准职业分类 2008 代码

task_id.description_en: Unique identifier for each atomic task
task_id.description_zh: 每个原子任务的唯一标识符

task_description.description_en: Verb-object structure describing the atomic task
task_description.description_zh: 动宾结构描述原子任务

values.Primary: 主要任务 (60% of total weight)
values.Secondary: 次要任务 (30% of total weight)
values.Ancillary: 辅助任务 (10% of total weight)

weight_category.description_en: Task importance category with standard weight distribution
weight_category.description_zh: 任务重要性类别，按标准权重分配

weight_percentage.description_en: Task weight, sum of all tasks = 1.00
weight_percentage.description_zh: 任务权重，所有任务之和=1.00

ksa_unit_name.description_zh: 知识/技能/能力单元名称

ksa_definition.description_en: Definition in the context of this occupation

Knowledge.Declarative: 陈述性知识 (知道是什么)
Knowledge.Procedural: 程序性知识 (知道怎么做)
Knowledge.Strategic: 战略性知识 (知道为什么)

substitutivity.description_en: AI ability to independently take over the task (1=lowest, 5=highest)
substitutivity.description_zh: AI 独立接管任务的能力 (1=最低，5=最高)

augmentation.description_en: AI ability to enhance task performance (1=lowest, 5=highest)
augmentation.description_zh: AI 提升任务绩效的能力 (1=最低，5=最高)

complementarity.description_zh: 人机协作潜力 (1=最低，5=最高)

cognitive_requirement.description_zh: 认知门槛 (1=简单重复，100=顶尖专家决策)

physicality_intensity.description_en: Physical labor dependence (1=pure office work, 100=heavy physical labor)
physicality_intensity.description_zh: 体力依赖 (1=纯脑力办公，100=重体力劳动)

language_intensity.description_en: Language dependence (1=almost no language, 100=high language dependence)
language_intensity.description_zh: 语言依赖 (1=几乎无语言，100=高语言依赖)
